title: Alliance (disambiguation)
content:
An '''Alliance''' can refer to several organizations and ships.

==[[Canon]]==
===Governments===
*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic]] (or Rebel Alliance)
*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems]] (or Separatist Alliance)

===Non-Government Organizations===
*[[Corporate Alliance]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Governments===
*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] (or Rebel Alliance)
*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] (or Separatist Alliance)
*[[Alliance of Free Planets]]
*[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] (or Galactic Alliance)

===Non-Government Organizations===
*[[Alliance (Second Imperial Civil War)]]
*[[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]]
*[[Smugglers' Alliance]]
*[[Eternal Alliance]]

===Starships===
*[[Alliance (Imperious-class)|''Alliance'']], an [[Imperious-class Star Destroyer|''Imperious''-class Star Destroyer]]
*[[Alliance (MC80 Liberty type Star Cruiser)|''Alliance'']], a [[MC80 Liberty type Star Cruiser]]

==Real-world products==
*''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''
*''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]''
*[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance (audiobook)|''The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance'' audiobook]]
*''[[Star Wars: Lethal Alliance]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''

*[[Galactic Alliance (disambiguation)]]
